text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I could've sworn someone called out to me...
Maybe they got scared and went home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The statue of the Three Goddesses...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, since I'm here, I might as well post a pic
with the statue. ♪
